title: PublishedComponent
description: A published component from a team or file library.

key.description: The globally unique identifier for the component.

file_key.description: The key of the Figma file containing the component.

node_id.description: The node ID of the component within the file.

thumbnail_url.description: A URL to a thumbnail image of the component.

description.description: The description of the component as entered by the publisher.

created_at.description: The UTC ISO 8601 time when the component was first published.

updated_at.description: The UTC ISO 8601 time when the component was last updated.
